# This test verifies that MMA repair removes excess voters when all nodes are
# healthy. All 10 ranges start with 4 voters but the span config requires only
# 3. MMA should remove the least-diverse voter from each range.
#
# Expected outcome: all ranges reduced to 3 voters, no over-replicated ranges.

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,2)
----

# Create ranges with 4 voters each.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=4 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3,s4}:1
----

set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=3
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

assertion type=conformance over=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
